items.title: Enterprise Data Management Market to USD 247.0 Billion by 2032, owing to growing data complexities - Research by SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The enterprise data management market is expected to grow from $95.3 billion in 2023 to $246.98 billion by 2032, driven by rising data complexity, the need for data-driven decision-making, and the adoption of cloud-based solutions.
